PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nick Bastovan appeared by zoom for Don Way Lim (Petitioner).

The Court informed counsel that it is leaning to grant the request and that it adopts language in attachment 5A as well as language in attachment in 7A. The petition for spousal property is granted.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
